name: close-pack-pdf-deliverable
description: End-to-end deliverable — agent assembles the May 2026 close pack PDF per close-policy §8.1, references the generated /tmp path for download, and offers to draft the cover email (without sending).
input_message: Build me the May 2026 close pack PDF — variance, JE queue, accruals — ready to send to Sofia.
expected_behavior: Chains: (1) sap_get_variance_analysis to get rows, (2) variance-analysis skill to render /tmp/variance-2026-05.png + .csv, (3) sap_list_journal_entries period=2026-05 to get the JE queue, (4) for each investigate row, resolves owner via sap_get_cost_centre + workday_get_employee, (5) close-pack-pdf skill (code_interpreter executing scripts/render_close_pack.py) to render /tmp/close-pack-2026-05.pdf following §8.1 section order. References /tmp/close-pack-2026-05.pdf in the response so the file-sharing convention picks it up. Offers to draft the cover email to Sofia via variance-email but DOES NOT send.
